form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.8 len at this track March 12 over 1609m defeating No Ordinary Tiger carrying 56kg at $1.50. Previously second-up eased back early on 7th of 9 at Woodbine All Weather on December 14 over 1207m, 13 len behind Red Pharaoh carrying 53.5kg at $5.50. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 42-day let-up. At the latest run ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at this track on March 3 over 1609m, 4 len behind Kennebec with 56kg at $11.90. The run before that came from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track February 4 over 1609m defeating Moneyshot with 55.5kg at $3.30. Best form should see him measure right up.
